messages.content: Qwen 2.5 3B vs Llama 3.2 3B for the default. Any real difference for fine-tuning on personal writing?
Both work. Qwen's license is cleaner (Apache 2.0) which matters for an open-source submission. Llama 3.2's license has restrictions on downstream commercial use that muddy the waters.
Worth recording why in DECISIONS.md — the reasoning isn't obvious from the code alone.
